catalog_content:
Item Name: Red Star Active Dry Yeast Non GMO 1.4 Oz. Pack Of 3.
Bullet Point 1: Product Of Mexico. Pack Of 3.
Bullet Point 2: Active Dry Yeast All Natural Yeast For Use In Bread Machines & Traditional Baking Non GMO.
Bullet Point 3: Baking Tips: Use a thermometer to determine liquid temperatures. For traditional baking methods, dissolve one packet in 1/4 cup warm liquid, 110-115 f. Add 1/2 tsp sugar. Wait for foam to double in volume. Or Blend yeast with dry ingredients. Add very warm liquids, 120-130 f Avoid liquid temperature above 140 f as this will harm the yeast. For bread machine, use liquid at 80 f.
Bullet Point 4: Does not contain wheat gluten or other cereal protein.
Bullet Point 5: Ingredients: Yeast.
Product Description: Product Of Mexico. Pack Of 3. Active Dry Yeast All Natural Yeast For Use In Bread Machines & Traditional Baking Non GMO. Baking Tips: Use a thermometer to determine liquid temperatures. For traditional baking methods, dissolve one packet in 1/4 cup warm liquid, 110-115 f. Add 1/2 tsp sugar. Wait for foam to double in volume. Or Blend yeast with dry ingredients. Add very warm liquids, 120-130 f Avoid liquid temperature above 140 f as this will harm the yeast. For bread machine, use liquid at 80 f. Does not contain wheat gluten or other cereal protein. Ingredients: Yeast.
Value: 4.2
Unit: Ounce
